title: notisia intonsa
intro: Notisia intonsa, also known as the "intense odor plant," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. Notisia intonsa has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Notisia intonsa typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
